note: This is a reference API that provides links to official NIV Bible sources. No copyrighted text is reproduced. Users should access the actual Bible text through the official sources listed below.

bible_gateway.name: Bible Gateway
bible_gateway.description: Search and read NIV Bible online

youversion.description: Read NIV Bible on web or mobile app

api_bible.name: API.Bible
api_bible.description: Access NIV through free API (requires signup)

biblica.name: Biblica (Copyright Holder)
biblica.description: Official NIV publisher and copyright holder
